title: Fauna
description: Fauna ports 1.21 variant dogs and add more animal variants to Minecraft 1.20.1. Adds nether dogs too!
body:
Fauna brings Minecraft 1.21’s dog variants to your world and introduces new Nether dogs with biome‑aware behaviors.
More creatures are on the way
- cows are in  development

Crimson and Warped nether dogs will attack each other while not tamed (if tamed they won't attack)
